_filing_note: Metadata-only record. Weights live on HuggingFace (WindyLabs/*) or on the remote training machine. Not locally testable.
name: Windy Edge

base.note: Catalogued in src/models/model_registry.json but HF repo WindyLabs/windy-edge returns 404. Weights were never uploaded from the machine that ran Kit OC1 Alpha's fleet build. Not currently testable.

examination_log.notes: Attempted to pull weights from HuggingFace. Result: repo_not_found_on_hf. This patient was catalogued by Kit OC1 Alpha in 2026-03-10 model_registry.json but the corresponding HF repo (corrected org: WindyProLabs/windy-edge) either doesn't exist or is empty. The actual weights likely live only on Kit OC1's original build machine and were never uploaded. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

Rebuilt windy-edge by downloading the base whisper model from HuggingFace and merging Kit OC1 Alpha's LoRA adapter (from ~/Desktop/grants_folder/windy-pro/artifacts/lora_checkpoints/). The LoRA was a Fog-of-Mirror fine-tune (r=4, α=8) designed to produce a distinct set of weights without meaningfully altering model quality. Merged model saved as safetensors at /home/user1-gpu/Desktop/grants_folder/windy-pro/restore_20260411/stt_rebuilt/windy-edge (2887.3 MB). This model was previously listed in Kit OC1 Alpha's 2026-03-10 model_registry.json but was never uploaded to HuggingFace. Dr. C rebuilt it on 2026-04-11 from the base + adapter. Pending: CT2 INT8 export (GPU required, queued behind Phase 3b) and STT quality certification (FLEURS WER test).

examination_log.method: Phase 3d STT certification — FLEURS english dev (15 samples), WER + CER + RTF + latency + peak VRAM

examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent STT quality certification. WER: 7.3% (A). RTF: 0.0207 (real-time factor, <1 = faster than real-time). Mean latency: 198.0 ms. Peak GPU: 3057 MB. Tested on FLEURS english dev split (15 clips). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.

consensus.notes: Shipping catalog entry from 2026-03-10. Local merged weights not present — can only be tested after pulling from HuggingFace or remote machine.
